reviews.comment:
Un enorme reconocimiento a los choferes del acá Dolores , por la buena predisposición en sus labores , amabilidad y servicio

(Translated by Google)
A huge recognition to the drivers here in Dolores, for their good disposition in their work, kindness and service.

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio con minishop, con gran parque alrededor ideal para caminar un rato tomar unos mates y seguir viaje!! Al 2/1/2024 salía  200p la carga de agua caliente para el termo

(Translated by Google)
Gas station with a mini-shop, surrounded by a large park, ideal for a stroll, a mate, and then continuing your journey! As of January 2, 2024, a hot water refill for a thermos cost 200 pesos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxMlplQTd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajo al mar paro en el ACA de Dolores. Es un lugar muy adecuado para descansar y hacer una parada al aire libre o en el salón. Tiene un restaurante y voy fiteria, con comida rápida o menu, tienda , wi fi, sanitarios y un parque con juegos infantiles.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel to the seaside, I stop at the ACA in Dolores. It's a great place to rest and take a break outdoors or in the lounge. It has a restaurant and snack bar, offering fast food or a set menu, a shop, Wi-Fi, restrooms, and a park with children's playground.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQxd2JtYlN3EAE

reviews.comment:
